home.note: Designed by hand. Created for performance.

about.title: An atelier shaped by movement and art.
about.lead: Every design begins as a hand-painted idea before it becomes a leotard made for performance.

story.title: Our Story
story.text: QINTI was created as a studio for artistic gymnastics apparel, where drawing, color and technique meet the needs of athletes and teams.

experience.title: 13 Years of Experience
experience.text: For more than thirteen years, the atelier has worked with clubs, academies and gymnasts who need garments that feel refined and reliable.

sketch.title: From Sketch to Performance
sketch.text: Each piece starts on paper, with painted lines and color studies that guide the final shape, details and visual rhythm.

process.title: Handcrafted Design Process
process.text: The process is careful and personal, moving from concept to fabric with attention to proportion, finish and the presence of each design.

peru.title: Made in Peru
peru.text: QINTI is made in Peru, carrying a studio sensibility rooted in craft, patience and expressive detail.

world.title: Designed for the World
world.text: The work travels beyond Peru to athletes and teams who want a leotard that feels distinctive, elegant and created with intention.

catalog.title: A quiet space for each design.
catalog.lead: One leotard is presented at a time, with space for silhouette, color, size and custom details.

controls.customizationPlaceholder: Describe your ideas, colors, inspiration or special requests.

orderMessage.intro: I am interested in this design.

contact.title: A conversation shaped by craft.
contact.lead: Reach the atelier for custom work, studio questions or a private consultation.
